Home Water Drinking Exercise Sleep Schedule sign in

Fun Health

We try to make having a healthy life more fun and achievable, by making it seem like an interactive game

🚨 Problems

Insufficient Water Intake

People don't drink the healthy amount of water per day, which is 9-12 cups ( or 4 Litres ) which results in catastrophic outcomes

Poor Sleeping Habits

Recent studies show that over 80% of the human population often have bad sleep schedule which not only significantly stunts the growth of children, but it also lowers the energy levels of the person throughout the day, so he will feel tired most of the time.

Low Excercise and Activity

Nowadays, most people dont excercise or even walk, as they spend most of their time on their mobile phones or tablets or computers, etc.. which can cause many health problems like obesity, diabetes and high blood pressure

🛠️ Solutions

What you need to do

First of all, you must drink alot of water, preferably 4L+ because more water wont affect you, but less water will damage your brain, lungs and kidneys. Moreover, good sleep and excercise is essential to mentain a healthy life style

What we offer you

Our app, Fun Health, offers to the user plenty of advantages that isnt present in other applications for example, this app helps the user regulate his sleep schedule, volume of water drank , and excercise by providing the user with points as a reward for each task completed throughout the day. Like : if you take 2000 steps today, you get 20 points and if you sleep full 9 hours, you take 30 points.

🎯 Target Audience

Teenagers

Teeangers from age 13-19 may suffer many health problems due to these main reasons, and that is because they dont know better. and our app guides them to the right path to mentain a good health

Old People

Old people require special conditions and because they cant take care of themselves, our app tries to make it easier for them to stay healthy
